scripts.dev:standalone: concurrently "pnpm --filter @lex-atc/shared dev" "VITE_ENABLE_MSW=true VITE_API_URL=/api pnpm --filter frontend dev"
scripts.dev:backend: concurrently "pnpm --filter @lex-atc/shared dev" "ALLOW_DEV_AUTH_FALLBACK=true pnpm --filter backend dev" "VITE_ENABLE_MSW=false VITE_API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000/api pnpm --filter frontend dev"
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @lex-atc/shared typecheck && pnpm --filter frontend typecheck && pnpm --filter backend typecheck:settlement && pnpm --filter backend typecheck:settlement:impl
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @lex-atc/shared test && pnpm --filter frontend test && pnpm --filter backend test
scripts.verify: pnpm build && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm docs:check
scripts.db:migrate: cd packages/backend && pnpm dlx dotenv-cli -e ../../.env -- pnpm dlx knex migrate:latest
scripts.db:rollback: cd packages/backend && pnpm dlx dotenv-cli -e ../../.env -- pnpm dlx knex migrate:rollback
